title: Tibet$^\prime$s Window on Primordial Gravitational Waves
author_string: Hong Li, Si-Yu Li, Yang Liu, Yong-Ping Li, Xinmin Zhang
abstract: As an essential part of Chinaâs Gravitational Waves Program, the Ali CMB Polarization Telescope (AliCPT) is a ground-based experiment aiming at the Primordial Gravitational Waves (PGWs) by measuring B-mode polarization of Cosmic Microwave Background (CMB). First proposed in 2014 and currently in fast construction phase, AliCPT is Chinaâs first CMB project that plans for commissioning in 2019. Led by the Institute of High Energy Physics (IHEP) under the Chinese Academy of Sciences (CAS), the project is a worldwide collaboration of more than fifteen universities and research institutes. Ali CMB Project is briefly introduced.
